metadata.description: Fully-local project memory for Claude Code — session logging plus a vendored TextRank summary, with no API key or external model.

plugins.name: recall
plugins.description: Fully-local project memory for Claude Code: logs each session to .recall/history.md and condenses it into .recall/context.md with a vendored TF-IDF + TextRank summarizer. No API key, no external model.
